topStories.title: US Fed keeps interest rates steady amid economic, geopolitical uncertainty
topStories.description: The US Federal Reserve keeps rates steady at 3.5–3.75 percent amidst a cooling labour market and Iran pressures.

topStories.title: GIFT Nifty Falls 3% After US Fed Rate Decision, Iran's Warning Of Attack On Gulf Oil
topStories.description: GIFT Nifty as of 1:32 a.m. was trading at 23,192.50, down 2.55% or 597 points, slipping near the 23,200 mark.

topStories.title: Top US spy accused of omitting Iran intel that contradicts Trump
topStories.description: Top US spy was accused of altering testimony on Iran, omitting details that contradict Trump’s threat claims.

topStories.title: Gold price slides below $5,000, drops to over one-month low
topStories.description: Spot gold dropped to a one-month low following the Federal Reserve's decision to hold interest rates steady, with expectations of higher rates for longer. A stronger dollar and ongoing Middle East conflict, including an escalation involving Iran's Pars gas field, further pressured gold prices.

topStories.title: US intel chief Gabbard says Iran was not rebuilding enrichment prior to war
topStories.description: Gabbard's testimony contradicts one of several justifications Trump has given for launching war with Iran.

topStories.title: Federal Reserve Chair Powell To Stay Until DOJ Investigation Is Over
topStories.description: He further added that he would serve as Chair pro-term until a successor is confirmed.

topStories.title: US Eases Venezuela Oil Sanctions To Allow Trade As Iran War Drives Up Prices
topStories.description: US companies will be allowed to do business with Venezuela's state-owned oil and gas company after the Treasury Department eased sanctions, with some limitations, on Wednesday.

dailyNews.description: In her prepared testimony, she wrote: “As a result of Operation Midnight Hammer, Iran's nuclear enrichment program was obliterated. There has been no efforts since then to try to rebuild their enrichment capability.”

dailyNews.description: Pradyut Bordoloi, often called Shashi Tharoor of Assam for his erudition, resigned from his Lok Sabha seat yesterday and is now set to contest the assembly elections on a BJP ticket.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Gabbard faces scrutiny over Iran nuclear intelligence claims
dailyNews.description: The US Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard, was questioned over what Democrats perceive as a discrepancy between White House and intelligence community claims.

dailyNews.title: FBI is buying location data to track US citizens, director confirms
dailyNews.description: FBI director Kash Patel told lawmakers that the agency is actively purchasing commercially available location data, which can track Americans without needing a warrant.

dailyNews.title: FOMC Meeting Highlights: Powell Holds Interest Rates For Second Time, Revises Inflation
dailyNews.description: Jerome Powell and ten other members voted for maintaining the interest rate, while voting against the action was Stephen I. Miran, who preferred to lower the target range for the federal funds rate by...

dailyNews.title: Assam Congress weighs MP’s flight to BJP
dailyNews.description: The fate of Pradyut Bordoloi’s son, the Congress candidate from eastern Assam’s Margherita constituency, hangs in the balance

dailyNews.title: US Stocks: Trade Desk shares drop 5% after report that Publicis advised clients against using its platform
dailyNews.description: Trade Desk shares dropped significantly after French advertising giant Publicis Groupe advised clients to avoid the platform. An independent audit found Trade Desk violated agreement clauses. Publicis confirmed the findings and will no longer recommend Trade Desk. Trade Desk disputes the audit's conclusions. The company faces strong competition in the ad tech market.

dailyNews.title: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
dailyNews.description: Energy prices are surging as the Iran war disrupts supply, raising risks for the US, China and Europe.

dailyNews.title: US Stocks: Unilever shares fall on investor concerns about food business spin-off
dailyNews.description: Unilever shares dropped as investors worried about a potential food business split. This comes soon after the company separated its ice cream brands. Analysts suggest the new CEO needs more time before further restructuring. The food business, including Knorr and Marmite, reported profits last year. Investors have long pushed for a sale of the slow-growing food division.

dailyNews.title: Trump temporarily waives century-old shipping law amid rising fuel costs
dailyNews.description: Lifting the Jones Act temporarily allows foreign ships to transport cargo across the US, but critics question efficacy.

dailyNews.title: Who will answer for the Iranian schoolchildren killed in Minab?
dailyNews.description: An investigation finds the Minab school strike may have been deliberate. Who can hold the US accountable?

dailyNews.title: BRS could fade like Janata Party, says Revanth
dailyNews.description: It will be a resounding victory for Congress in 2029, says CM

dailyNews.title: GOP governors, AGs back Trump SAVE Act push, warn system gives ‘undue influence’ to states with illegal aliens
dailyNews.description: Republican governors and attorneys general back citizenship verification through the SAVE America Act for federal elections, arguing gaps in voter registration create unfair influence.

dailyNews.title: Venezuela's Delcy Rodriguez replaces sanctioned loyalist defense minister with military intel head
dailyNews.description: Acting president Delcy Rodriguez has appointed Gustavo Gonzalez Lopez to lead the defense ministry, a move to consolidate military control.

dailyNews.title: FCC boss vows to ‘rebalance’ media, urges more pro-America programming
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration's FCC launched an effort to rebalance the media landscape, encouraging local broadcasters to prioritize pro-America content over network programming.

dailyNews.title: White House says ‘no one’ changing Trump enforcement agenda in response to Angel Mom appeal to Mullin
dailyNews.description: The White House and DHS issued a response to a request by Angel Mom Angie Morfin, whose 13-year-old son, Ruben, was executed by an illegal alien gang member in California.

dailyNews.title: Sen Mullin gets emotional recounting Trump's kindness to his son
dailyNews.description: Sen. Markwayne Mullin fought back tears during his confirmation hearing as he revealed how President Donald Trump supported his family after his son's brain injury.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Intelligence Saw No Change in Iran’s Missile Capabilities Before War
dailyNews.description: On Wednesday, the director of national intelligence and C.I.A. director contradicted one of the justifications the Trump administration had given for its attacks on Iran.

dailyNews.title: The Cost of the A.I. Boom: A Trade Deficit the President Detests
dailyNews.description: A recent surge of A.I.-related imports has become an impediment to the smaller trade deficit President Trump wants.

dailyNews.title: Mullin Signals He Would End Noem Policy That Slowed Disaster Aid
dailyNews.description: The president’s nominee, Markwayne Mullin, said he would avoid “micromanaging” FEMA.

dailyNews.title: Stratton, Illinois Senate Primary Winner, Promises a ‘Fight’ With Trump
dailyNews.description: Ms. Stratton, a Democrat whose viral campaign ad featured voters’ profane views of Mr. Trump, said her campaign’s aggressive messaging was resonating.

dailyNews.title: Silicon Valley Musters Behind-the-Scenes Support for Anthropic
dailyNews.description: Tech companies have been reluctant to directly confront Trump administration officials over their contract feud with the A.I. start-up.

dailyNews.title: Ossoff questions Gabbard about Iran posing an 'imminent nuclear threat'
dailyNews.description: Sen. Jon Ossoff, D-Ga., questioned Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard whether intelligence showed Iran posed a "imminent nuclear threat" as the White House had previously said to justify the ongoing conflict.

dailyNews.title: Voters in a key Pennsylvania swing district weigh in on Trump, gas prices and Iran war
dailyNews.description: NBC News spoke to voters at a gas station in the 10th District, the type of area that will be key for Republicans to win in the midterms if they hope to retain control of the House majority.
